name: SMBC
attribution: Saturday Morning Breakfast Cereal by Zach Weinersmith

comics.title: Communication
comics.alt: They can also communicate via quantum superposition, but it's way less interesting.

comics.title: Evolution
comics.alt: This is why humans evolved our unique ability to self-deceive.

comics.title: Old
comics.alt: Things will never again be so beautiful.

comics.title: Dadalus
comics.alt: Disobey God and get drowned immediately is really more of an Abrahamic religion thing.

comics.title: Final
comics.alt: It ends up okay when she two-hands his butt right before the world is annihilated.

comics.title: Zod
comics.alt: I recently rewatched the 80s Superman movies, and it's really unclear to me why they will not Kneel Before Zod.

comics.title: Four
comics.alt: Readers are encouraged to try to beat this, and fail.

comics.title: Turing
comics.alt: Later they make you pay for the premium version in order to betray humanity.

comics.title: Memory
comics.alt: The sad part is he just keeps pressing the button till be random luck the robot confesses.

comics.title: Typical
comics.alt: I believe it follows that an average married man should be looking for about 5/6 of a wife.

comics.title: Percent
comics.alt: Later he starts adding quest items she doesn't want, but feels compelled to earn.

comics.title: Adult
comics.alt: They still scrape parmesan on it till you say when, though.

comics.title: App
comics.alt: If a company would just once say 'make sure not to use the app' they would have my loyalty forever.

comics.title: Uncanny
comics.alt: It's not an uncanny valley, it's an uncanny mountain that you're afraid to climb.

comics.title: Minos
comics.alt: Pretty sure Midas would've gotten plenty of action too.

comics.title: Protocol
comics.alt: This is why there are tons of fantasy books about alchemists and NOTHING about chemists.

comics.title: Mission
comics.alt: Created after watching my CTO brother struggle to make an iPhone transmit live video to a Windows desktop for over an hour.

comics.title: Milgram
comics.alt: Come across this while reading Melanie Mitchell's delightful book, Complexity - A Guided Tour.

comics.title: Agency
comics.alt: I've been doing jokes about robots being better than humans for 20 years, but just lately I got told I do too much AI propaganda.

comics.title: Comedy
comics.alt: This is officially a dare, standup comics.
